{{Quote|Another explosion, Sardoth? It's really started, hasn't it?|Erla to [[Sardoth]]|<ref name="Rebellion 6">[[Rebellion 6|''Rebellion'' 6]]</ref>}}
'''Erla''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] who resided on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ahakista/Legends|Ahakista]] and was an associate of [[Sardoth]]. Erla was likely an employee of [[Raze (criminal)|Raze]], Sardoth's employer, as well. Along with Sardoth, Erla watched the assassination of [[Council]]man [[Derral]] and discussed the escalation of Ahakista's civil war.
